Intraday post (07/Jan)

Weekly post:

Challenges for 2026 | Weekly post (05 - 09/Jan)

I dropped a big post about the yearly outlook of challenges and market/economy risks:

The challenges of 2026

In the post that follows, I have compiled the geopolitical, economic, and equity-market developments and challenges that have embedded significant—yet still underpriced—risk in the market.

Spend some time with it!

ISM service PMI today at 10AM

Not expecting big impact now. Market wants to see NFP as it will define Fed.

Let’s look at the daily positioning…

INTRADAY POST Coding today’s positioning:

This is a very steep net positive speed profile, with upside vvol being heavily sold too.

The centroid of the “risk reversal” profile is at 6963.58it starts to behave as a line-in-the-sand as time passes, especially late PM (can’t code the exact hourly interval for this)

Downside pivot is at 6938.86with target of 6885.94 with a nice reversion opportunity back to the pivot. To break the pivot, market needs volatility, otherwise 6945 local gamma magnet is strong.

Upside pivot is at 6972.49with target of 6987.05that is rather a rejecting resistance, back towards the pivot.

The main bet is a rangebound around 6945, while upside is magnetic, a too fast move could provide pressure on the spot. But no sentiment shift now.

OptionsDepth Heatmap
